subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Through the grace and bounty of the Lord, I cherish the hope that thou mayest ever be confirmed in service at His Divine Threshold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر میثاق از فضل و موهبت پروردگار امیدوارم که همواره موفق بخدمت دربار
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @call to action
